beats.narrative: Player wakes in the starter village: a small grass-ringed home plot with no encounters. jan Sewi runs the starter ceremony; jan Pona Tomo, jan Telo Well, jan Poki Tomo, and jan Kili Tomo provide ambient two-beat village dialog. Walking up to jan Sewi fires the starter ceremony and offers the three starters: kon_moli, telo_jaki, and jan_ike_lili. Picking one sets starter_chosen, drops three poki_lili, adds the chosen creature to the party at level 5, and unlocks the eastern warp.

Long forest path-route east-to-west, framed by trees. Three tall-grass rectangles host the player's first encounters across the level 3-7 band: jan_ike_lili, jan_utala_lili, soweli_musi, soweli_kili, soweli_jaki, waso_pimeja, soweli_anpa, soweli_kon, jan_moli, waso_toki, akesi_linja, and soweli_nena. Four ambient route walkers plus jan Ike bring the map to five NPC markers. Defeating jan Ike, or losing and restoring at the last village, opens the eastern warp.

Mountain pass with stone footpaths between blocked cliffs, rocks, and tall-grass clumps. Encounters skew wawa-typed and rocky: jan_wawa, jan_wawa_linja, jan_wawa_jaki, sijelo_kiwen, soweli_palisa, waso_lape, akesi_seli, and soweli_sewi. jan Kiwen, jan Kala, jan Waso Sewi, and jan Nasin Sewi provide ambient route dialog. At the top, jan Wawa blocks the northward path with the first jan lawa fight. Winning sets badge_sewi and grants the reward word sewi.

Round village built on a stone island in the middle of a lake. No tall grass and no random encounters: this is a story-and-shop beat. jan Telo is the jan lawa of ma_telo; beating him sets badge_telo and grants telo. jan Kala Lake, jan Olin Telo, jan Moku, and jan Sike Telo fill the lake-village NPC floor. jan Moku runs a lakeside stall that sells poki_lili and kili for ma.

Cold-land village with snow and ice ground, stone paths, snow tall grass, trees, houses, rocks, and a fenced herb garden. Encounters mix sijelo_linja, sijelo_kiwen, jan_pi_sewi_pimeja, waso_lete, soweli_nena, soweli_kiwen, and sijelo_utala at levels 7-12. jan Lete is the jan lawa. jan Anpa, jan Suno Lete, jan Poki Lete, and jan Kasi complete the five-NPC village floor. Beating jan Lete sets badge_lete and grants lete.

The great peak is the hardest jan lawa challenge before the endgame: a tall narrow cave-shrine with stone floors, blocked rock walls, torch landmarks, and sparse encounter overgrowth. Encounters are heavy elites: jan_wawa_suli, jan_wawa_utala, jan_utala_suli, soweli_utala, sijelo_utala, waso_moku, waso_moli, soweli_sewi, soweli_alasa, and soweli_wawa at levels 10-15. jan Kiwen Suli, jan Pi Kon, jan Pimeja Suli, and jan Pi Nasin flesh out the climb before jan Suli. Beating jan Suli sets badge_suli and grants suli.

Endgame approach: long riverside route with a grassy west bank, deep water channel, sandbar path, and two aquatic encounter patches. Encounters include jan_moli, kon_moli, telo_jaki, kala_telo, kala_uta, kala_tomo, jan_moli_wawa, kala_luka, seli_moli, akesi_suli, and the rare akesi_sewi across levels 7-13. jan Kala Lili, jan Moku Pona, jan Kala Suli, jan Olin Telo, and jan Suno Telo populate the bank. With all four region badges in hand, final_boss_trigger fires the akesi_sewi cutscene; the green-dragon clear path plays the green dragon defeat animation.
